title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click. It automates both the control plane and data plane management while allowing customization for teams that need it. The service includes built-in auto scaling via Karpenter, cost optimization, and support for AI workloads including inference and training at scale.
